dataIdInfo.idPurp: This notebook is an external part of the Roof Damage Assessment toolbox. It trains and saves a single-class Mask2Former deep learning model for roof decking or roof hole delineation in aerial imagery.
dataIdInfo.idAbs:
For full methodological details, please refer to the publication:

Kucharczyk, M., Nesbit, P. R., & Hugenholtz, C. H. (2025). Automated Mapping of Post-Storm Roof Damage Using Deep Learning and Aerial Imagery: A Case Study in the Caribbean. Remote Sensing, 17(20), 3456. https://doi.org/10.3390/rs17203456

For usage instructions, please visit: https://github.com/maja-kucharczyk/roof-damage-assessment

Consts.useLimit: This work is licensed under CC BY 4.0 (Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International), a permissive license allowing anyone to freely share, copy, adapt, and use material for any purpose, even commercially, as long as they give proper attribution (credit) to the original creators, indicate if changes were made, and provide a link to the license.
